en_title: The Steam Machine Was Originally Meant to Cost About $750
cn_title: Steam Machine原计划售价约750美元(约合人民币5085元)
subtitle: 奈何RAM太贵
opus_summary: Valve公布迷你PC Steam Machine，入门版512GB定价1049美元(约合人民币7112元)。工程师透露存储芯片危机前原计划定价约749美元(约合人民币5078元)。

paragraphs.en: The Steam Machine got announced earlier today with an eye-watering $1049 asking price for the entry-level 512GB model. But that's probably not the price Valve had in mind for its mini gaming PC.
paragraphs.cn: 今天早些时候，Steam Machine正式公布，其入门级512GB型号的售价高达1049美元(约合人民币7112元)，令人瞠目。但这很可能不是Valve最初为这款迷你游戏PC设定的价格。

paragraphs.en: When I got a chance to sit down with Valve Engineers Pierre-Loup Griffais and Yazan Aldehayyat last week to talk about the Steam Machine , I asked them what the Steam Machine would have cost before the current memory market. And while neither of them would give me a hard number, I was told that it was "probably similar" to the price increase that the Steam Deck experienced last month .
paragraphs.cn: 上周，我有幸与Valve工程师Pierre-Loup Griffais和Yazan Aldehayyat就Steam Machine进行了一番交流，我问他们，如果放在当前内存市场行情之前，Steam Machine原本会定价多少。虽然两人都没有给出一个确切数字，但他们告诉我，价格变化「很可能与」Steam Deck上个月经历的涨价「幅度差不多」。

paragraphs.en: Some quick napkin math pins that Steam Deck price increase at around 35-36% above the handheld's original $549 asking price, resulting in the new price of $789. If you do the same math for a hypothetical $749 pre-RAMflation Steam Machine, that would make the final $1049 price about 33% more expensive.
paragraphs.cn: 简单算一下，Steam Deck原先标价549美元(约合人民币3722元)，涨到789美元(约合人民币5349元)，涨幅约35%到36%。如果Steam Machine在内存涨前假设售价为749美元(约合人民币5078元)，按同样比例计算，最终1049美元(约合人民币7112元)的定价大约贵了33%。

paragraphs.en: I was told that Valve hadn't landed on a final price before it had to start tweaking the price to reflect the new reality that we're living through, but a $749 price tag would put it in spitting distance with my original guess that the Steam Machine would cost about $800.
paragraphs.cn: Valve方面告诉我，在他们不得不根据眼前的现实调整价格之前，并未敲定最终定价。但749美元(约合人民币5078元)的价位，与我当初猜测Steam Machine大约卖800美元(约合人民币5424元)相差无几。

paragraphs.en: We've been hearing conflicting things about how long the current AI-fueled RAM crisis will be going on, but Valve isn't the only gaming company that's raising prices. Both the Xbox Series X and PlayStation 5 had price increases a couple months ago, and according to a memo by Xbox CEO Asha Sharma , the hardware going into Xbox consoles will eventually cost five times more than it originally did, so those will probably see yet another price rise at some point.
paragraphs.cn: 关于当前这轮由AI需求引爆的内存危机会持续多久，各方说法不一。但Valve并非唯一在涨价的游戏公司——XBOX Series X和PlayStation 5几个月前也相继涨价。而且根据XBOX首席执行官Asha Sharma的一份内部备忘录，未来XBOX主机所用硬件的成本最终将是原来的五倍，因此这些产品很可能在某个时间点再次提价。

paragraphs.en: But, who knows? Maybe the RAM bubble will burst and Valve will be able to bring down the price closer to its initial target. But I wouldn't hold my breath.
paragraphs.cn: 不过谁知道呢？也许内存泡沫会破裂，Valve就能把价格降到更接近最初的目标。但我可不会指望这个。

paragraphs.en: Jackie Thomas is the Hardware and Buying Guides Editor at IGN and the PC components queen. You can follow her @Jackiecobra
paragraphs.cn: Jackie Thomas，IGN硬件与购买指南编辑，人称PC组件女王。你可以在X上关注她@Jackiecobra。
